LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APR-26-2021 HEARING RE: SPECIALLY APPEARING RESPONDENT JEREMY R. BAIER'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS ISSUED TO HEIR CASH NOW, LLC, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SPECIALLY APPEARING RESPONDENT JEREMY R. BAIER'S MOTION TO QUASH IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR AN AWARD OF FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED, AS HE DOES NOT CITE ANY STATUTORY OR CONTRACTUAL BASIS FOR SUCH AN AWARD. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Specially Appearing Respondent Jeremy R. Baier?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Summons Issued To Heir Cash Now, Llc; Declaration Of Jeremy R. Baier In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Specially Appearing Respondent Jeremy R. Baier's Motion To Quash Summons Issued To Heir Cash Now, LLC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Specially appearing respondent Jeremy R. Baier's motion to quash is granted. Respondent's request for an award of fees and costs is denied, as he does not cite any statutory or contractual basis for such an award. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
